response:
The name of Juan Manuel Márquez's WBO champion holding younger brother is **Rafael Márquez**. 

Juan Manuel Márquez is the older brother of Rafael Márquez, who is a professional boxer and a two-time world champion in two weight classes. Rafael Márquez held the IBF bantamweight title from 2003 to 2007 and the WBC, "Ring" magazine, and lineal super bantamweight titles in 2007. He also held the IBO bantamweight title from 2005 to 2007.
